caribbean.headline: Small Craft Advisories Impact Bimini Waters Today
caribbean.paragraph: Bimini is experiencing sustained winds of 24 knots with wave heights reaching 7.6 feet and an east-dominant swell period of 8 seconds, prompting Small Craft Advisories in the area. Rain chances remain moderate at 37 percent while St. Thomas sees lighter winds near 14 knots with less marine impact.

mediterranean.headline: Moderate Winds and Waves Affect Mykonos Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing moderate winds up to 24 knots with wave heights reaching 6.2 feet and a dominant north swell period of 7 seconds. Rain chances remain low at 23 percent while Haifa sees lighter winds near 19 knots with less impact on local marine conditions.
